name: Pork Dijon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork tenderloin into medallions.
2. Sauté the medallions in hot oil in a nonstick frying pan until browned.
3. Mix together the chicken broth, mustard, and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the sauce over the medallions.
5. Cook, stirring the sauce until thickened; cover and simmer until the pork is cooked through.
6. Divide into 4 equal portions.
4 servings/Serving size: 1/4 recipe
Exchanges: All dinner menus this week have about 550 calories and include:
